testcase.name: test_04_upload_pdf_document
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:137: in test_04_upload_pdf_document assert response.status_code == 200, f"Upload failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Upload failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_05_stamp_document_center_position
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:206: in test_05_stamp_document_center_position assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stamp failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stamp failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_06_stamp_document_corners
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:288: in test_06_stamp_document_corners assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stamp at {corner_name} failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stamp at top-left failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_07_verify_qr_stamp
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:299: in test_07_verify_qr_stamp result = self.test_05_stamp_document_center_position() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:206: in test_05_stamp_document_center_position assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stamp failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Stamp failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_08_digital_signature_mode
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:364: in test_08_digital_signature_mode assert response.status_code == 200, f"Normal mode stamp failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Normal mode stamp failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","file"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_stamp_size_is_fixed

failure.message: AssertionError: Stamp with size {'w': 100, 'h': 50} failed assert 422 == 200 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:459: in test_09_stamp_size_is_fixed assert response.status_code == 200, f"Stamp with size {size} failed" E AssertionError: Stamp with size {'w': 100, 'h': 50} failed E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_10_stamps_list_api
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:466: in test_10_stamps_list_api self.login() tests/test_stamp_ssot_arch.py:51: in login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please slow down.","retry_after":"5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
